steps.title: Separate two full clauses
steps.content: Before the blank, the sentence says Colvin was arrested for the same offense. After it, According to some historians introduces a new independent clause about what her arrest led to.

steps.title: Reject weak boundaries
steps.content: B creates a comma splice, C fuses the clauses with no punctuation, and D adds and without a clean structure. A period separates the two complete sentences. The answer is A.
